ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "total_products" INTEGER /* Total number of products in the order */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g. credit card, PayPal) */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order, if any */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "product_price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "discounted_price" TEXT /* Discounted price of the product, if applicable */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item is a gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is enrolled in, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES product_brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order for which the status is being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status update, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_analytics" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Sales trend for the product (e.g. increasing, decreasing) */,
  "customer_preference" TEXT /* Customer preference for the product (e.g. frequently purchased, rarely purchased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id")
)
